statim 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Declare a method variant for a test implementation

Source: R/htest-spec.R
method_spec.Rd

method_spec() declares a named method variant and its default arguments for use in test_define(). Pass the result to the method property.

Usage

method_spec(name, method_type, defaults = list())

Arguments

name

A string naming the method. E.g. "boot", "permute". Must match the .method argument passed to via().

method_type

A string naming the method type. E.g. "bootstrap", "replicate", "bayes".

defaults

A named list of default arguments for this method. E.g. list(n = 1000L, seed = NULL).

Value

A method_spec S7 object.

See also

test_define(), via()

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
method_spec(
    "boot",
    method_type = "bootstrap",
    defaults = list(n = 1000L, seed = NULL)
)
} # }
